title: stelis bivalvis
intro: Stelis bivalvis, also known as the "Two-lobed Stelis," is a type of orchid plant that is native to Central and South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stelis bivalvis include its ability to help lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Traditionally, the plant is prepared for herbal use by boiling its leaves in water to create a tea that is used to treat various ailments.
